title: hyobanche rubra
intro: Hyobanche rubra, also known as the red devil's claw or scrambling devil's claw, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hyobanche rubra include pain relief, reducing fever, and treating various conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Hyobanche rubra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
